query: UPDATE landingPages SET originalAngle = JSON_SET(originalAngle, '$.problemAgitation', COALESCE(JSON_EXTRACT(originalAngle, '$.problemAgitation'), 'Many people struggle with this challenge every day.'), '$.solutionIntro', COALESCE(JSON_EXTRACT(originalAngle, '$.solutionIntro'), 'There is a proven solution that works.'), '$.whyOldFail', COALESCE(JSON_EXTRACT(originalAngle, '$.whyOldFail'), 'Traditional methods do not work because they miss the core issue.'), '$.uniqueMechanism', COALESCE(JSON_EXTRACT(originalAngle, '$.uniqueMechanism'), 'Our unique system addresses the root cause.'), '$.insiderAdvantages', COALESCE(JSON_EXTRACT(originalAngle, '$.insiderAdvantages'), 'Get exclusive access to proven strategies.')) WHERE originalAngle IS NOT NULL;

WHERE originalAngle IS NOT NULL;
